name: santiagosainz/skills
description: Portable engineering workflow skills for Codex, OpenCode, and Pi.

skills.name: requirements-review
skills.runtimeBehavior: Codex uses direct tool work; OpenCode uses native task tracking; Pi uses file-backed state.

skills.name: domain-modeling
skills.runtimeBehavior: Builds project language from repo evidence before naming or planning.

skills.name: architecture-review
skills.runtimeBehavior: Ranks structural risks and reversible refactors without forcing implementation.

skills.name: implementation-plan
skills.runtimeBehavior: Converts intent into independently verifiable work slices.

skills.name: test-and-verify
skills.runtimeBehavior: Proves one behavior with repo-native checks and concrete evidence.

skills.name: debug
skills.runtimeBehavior: Reproduces, minimizes, fixes root cause, and reruns the original repro.

skills.name: handoff
skills.runtimeBehavior: Writes durable task state for long-running or multi-agent work.
